title: TagKey
description: A tag key, used to group tag values. Tag keys define namespaces for tag values that can be attached to resources for organization and policy purposes.

name.description: The resource name of the tag key in the form tagKeys/{tag_key_id}. Output only.

parent.description: The resource name of the parent. Must be of the form organizations/{org_id}.

shortName.description: The user-friendly short name for the tag key. The short name must be unique within the same parent and have a maximum length of 256 characters.

namespacedName.description: The namespaced name of the tag key in the form {parentId}/{shortName}. Output only.

description.description: User-assigned description of the tag key. Maximum length of 256 characters.

createTime.description: Timestamp when the tag key was created. Output only.

updateTime.description: Timestamp when the tag key was last modified. Output only.

etag.description: Entity tag for optimistic concurrency control.
